{{Quote|Ugh, I can't believe you're still flying that relic, Jango.|[[Rozatta|Roz]]|audio=JastersLegacyOldWreck.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Bounty Hunter">''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''</ref>}}
'''''Jaster's Legacy ('<nowiki/>''JAST07''') was the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], up until shortly after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==History==
[[File:Jasterlegacy.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Jaster's Legacy''.]]

It was named after Fett's mentor [[Jaster Mereel]] (who was its original owner). The ship was a [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Amphibious Interstellar Assault Transport/infantry]].

On a mission to capture a [[Bendix Fust|bounty]] on the prison colony of [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]], Jango flew ''Jaster's Legacy'' into the system in [[1729|another ship's]] shadow and left it on the surface unguarded. When he came back out of the facility during a prison riot, another bounty hunter named [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] was trying to slice into the ship. While Fett and Wesell argued about the bounty on [[Bendix Fust]], a [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray-31''-class patrol and attack craft]] appeared and fired upon the ship, destroying it. In need of a new ship, Jango himself stole one of the prison's prototype ''Firespray'' class patrol craft, which he then used to destroy the remaining ''Firespray''s in the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar bay]], and eventually named [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']].
